description:
This intermediate-level HTML5 quiz tests knowledge of advanced semantic elements beyond basic tags like `<div>` and `<span>`. It uses a friendly, approachable tone with emojis to engage learners while challenging them to apply HTML5 best practices.
Topics: Semantic HTML5 elements, HTML5 structure and syntax, Web development fundamentals
Audience: Web developers with basic to intermediate HTML knowledge seeking to enhance their understanding of modern semantic markup and improve code quality.
